---
name: Policy proposal
about: Suggest or refine a policy (truth-policy checklist)
title: "[Policy] "
labels: policy
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Metric, baseline, who is hurt?

## Mechanism

What incentive or constraint produces the problem?

## Options

- [ ] A Status quo
- [ ] B Abolish / deregulate
- [ ] C Price / tax reform
- [ ] D Conditional transfer
- [ ] E Public provision / invest
- [ ] F Pilot

Your preferred option and why:

## Evidence

| Claim | Confidence (S/M/W/Spec) | Source class |
|-------|-------------------------|--------------|
| | | |

## Distribution & transfer constraint

Does this raise returns to legal work? Risk that productive people exit?

## Fiscal

Static € (range + confidence). Dynamic effects?

## Belgian competence

Federal / Flanders / local / EU?

## Falsifier

We reverse if _____ within _____.

## Fits north star?

- [ ] Truth-seeking (assumptions explicit)
- [ ] Abundance-oriented
- [ ] Incentive-compatible safety net
- [ ] “Do nothing” considered
- [ ] No invented numbers
